auth.account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact support
auth.account_locked: Your account has been locked due to too many failed login attempts

registration.subject: Welcome to {app_name} - Account Created
registration.preheader: Your {app_name} account has been created successfully
registration.title: Account Created Successfully
registration.body: Thank you for registering with {app_name}! Your account has been created successfully.
registration.step_1: Verify your email address by clicking the button below
registration.step_3: Enable two-factor authentication for extra security
registration.button_note: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.
registration.security_note: If you did not create this account, please ignore this email.

email_verification.subject: Verify Your Email Address
email_verification.preheader: Please verify your email to activate your account
email_verification.title: Verify Your Email Address
email_verification.body: Please click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.
email_verification.expires: This verification link will expire in {hours} hours.
email_verification.link_note: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the link below into your browser:
email_verification.ignore_note: If you did not create an account, please ignore this email.

password_reset.subject: Reset Your Password
password_reset.preheader: You requested to reset your password
password_reset.title: Reset Your Password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
password_reset.expires: This password reset link will expire in {hours} hour(s).
password_reset.link_note: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the link below into your browser:
password_reset.security_warning: Never share this link with anyone. Our team will never ask for your password.
password_reset.ignore_note: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

password_changed.subject: Your Password Has Been Changed
password_changed.title: Password Changed Successfully
password_changed.body: This is a confirmation that your password has been successfully changed.
password_changed.not_you_body: If you did not make this change, please secure your account immediately by resetting your password and enabling two-factor authentication.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {app_name}!
welcome.preheader: Welcome aboard! Your account is now verified.
welcome.title: Welcome to {app_name}!
welcome.body: Thank you for verifying your email. Welcome to {app_name}!
welcome.verified_message: Your account is now fully activated and ready to use.
welcome.tip_1: Explore your dashboard to see all available features
welcome.tip_2: Complete your profile to personalize your experience
welcome.tip_3: Enable two-factor authentication for enhanced security
welcome.help_text: Our support team is here to help you get the most out of the platform.

login_new_device.subject: New Login Detected
login_new_device.preheader: A new device logged into your account
login_new_device.title: New Login Detected
login_new_device.body: We noticed a login to your account from a new device or location.
login_new_device.if_you: If this was you, you can safely ignore this email.
login_new_device.not_you_body: If you don't recognize this activity, please secure your account immediately.

account_locked.subject: Account Locked - Action Required
account_locked.preheader: Your account has been temporarily locked
account_locked.title: Account Locked
account_locked.body: Your account has been temporarily locked for security reasons.
account_locked.action_1: Wait for the lockout period to expire (usually 30 minutes)
account_locked.action_2: Use the unlock link below if available
account_locked.action_3: Contact support if you need immediate assistance
account_locked.contact_support: If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team.

mfa_enabled.subject: Two-Factor Authentication Enabled
mfa_enabled.preheader: Your account is now more secure
mfa_enabled.title: Two-Factor Authentication Enabled
mfa_enabled.body: Two-factor authentication has been successfully enabled on your account.
mfa_enabled.status_message: Your account is now protected with an additional layer of security.
mfa_enabled.benefit_1: You'll need your authenticator app each time you log in
mfa_enabled.benefit_2: Even if someone knows your password, they can't access your account
mfa_enabled.benefit_3: You have backup codes in case you lose access to your device
mfa_enabled.backup_codes_title: Important: Keep Your Backup Codes Safe
mfa_enabled.backup_codes_message: Make sure to store your backup codes in a secure place. You'll need them if you lose access to your authenticator app.
mfa_enabled.not_you: If you did not enable two-factor authentication, please contact support immediately.

mfa_disabled.subject: Two-Factor Authentication Disabled
mfa_disabled.preheader: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account
mfa_disabled.title: Two-Factor Authentication Disabled
mfa_disabled.body: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account.
mfa_disabled.warning: Your account is now less secure. We recommend re-enabling MFA.
mfa_disabled.not_you: If you did not disable two-factor authentication, please secure your account immediately.

tenant_invitation.subject: You've Been Invited to Join {tenant_name}
tenant_invitation.preheader: You have a pending invitation to join {tenant_name}
tenant_invitation.title: You're Invited!
tenant_invitation.what_happens: Click the button below to accept the invitation and join the team.
tenant_invitation.button_note: This invitation link is unique to you.
tenant_invitation.ignore_note: If you don't want to join, simply ignore this email.

users.email_exists: A user with this email already exists

tenants.slug_exists: A tenant with this slug already exists

roles.in_use: Cannot delete role that is assigned to users

permissions.denied: You do not have permission to perform this action

validation.password_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

rate_limit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in {seconds} seconds
